# ExternalEmission Process CMakeLists.txt
# Generated by CATChem Process Generator

# Add ExternalEmission process module
add_library(externalemission_process
    ExternalEmissionProcess_Mod.F90
)

# Link dependencies
target_link_libraries(externalemission_process
    precision_mod
    state_mod
    error_mod
    process_interface_mod
)

# Include directories
target_include_directories(externalemission_process PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

# Install targets
install(TARGETS externalemission_process
    DESTINATION lib
)

# Install module files
install(FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/externalemissionprocess_mod.mod
    DESTINATION include
)
